name: Compile LaTeX Documents in Repository

on:
  push:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build_individual_papers:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        paper:
          - dir: Paper
            tex_file: sbc_paper

    steps:
    - name: Checkout Repository
      uses: actions/checkout@v6
  
    - name: List checked out files
      run: ls -laR
      
    - name: Compile Paper
      uses: devinatkin/latex-action/compile_latex@main
      with:
        tex-file: ${{ matrix.paper.tex_file }}
        directory: ${{ matrix.paper.dir }}

    - name: Upload Paper PDF to Artifacts
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v6
      with:
        name: ${{ matrix.paper.tex_file }}_paper_pdf
        path: ${{ matrix.paper.dir }}/*.pdf
